issues.description: Trigger should be 'EndOfTurn' not 'Activated'. This is an automatic end-of-turn effect, not a player-activated ability.
Action type 'GiveDon' is incorrect. The effect sets DON!! cards as active (rests them), which should use 'Rest' or a similar mechanic. 'GiveDon' adds DON!! to the pool, not activates existing ones.
KO is optional ('You may trash this Character'), but DSL shows no optionality. Effect should reflect the optional nature of the self-trash.
